title: Millida Rating
description: Millida Rating тАФ rating game servers Minecraft, this plugin allows you to quickly implement rewards for players without programming knowledge, and API connection skills for a couple of clicks.
body: # Millida Rating Plugin ЁЯОЙ A plugin for awarding voters on the Millida Rating monitoring system. ЁЯПЖ ![Millida Rating тАФ best rating of Minecraft game servers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b48083ddebbdf320a32bea30da85ba126bedee6.png) ## Supported Versions: * `Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.8 тАФ 1.21` ЁЯОо ## Features: * Award distribution ЁЯОБ * Cumulative reward system similar to battle passes ЁЯПЕ * Support for MySQL and SQLite databases ЁЯТ╛ * Integration with DecentHolograms ЁЯМЯ * Integration with PlaceholderAPI ЁЯФЧ # Installation тЪЩя╕П After placing the plugin in the `plugins` folder, you need to start and stop the server, as the plugin does not work without preliminary configuration for security purposes. For the initial launch, just configure `server_id`. ЁЯФз **[!!!]** If you do not want to issue rewards for votes made before the plugin installation, set `rewards.enabled: false` before the first launch of the plugin and simply execute the command `/rating admin clearrewards` after starting the server. ЁЯЪл For convenient configuration while the server is running, there is the command `/rating admin reload`, but it is highly recommended to use it exclusively during testing, not during an already running server with players. You can add only `holograms` and `gui` to this command to reload only the hologram module. ЁЯФД There are also commands for testing plugin settings: `/rating admin clear ` and `/rating admin vote `, which clear a player's progress and give them one fake vote, respectively. ЁЯзк **[!!!]** If something goes wrong, the plugin immediately shuts down for security reasons to prevent players from losing their rewards or receiving an undeservedly large amount. тЪая╕П # Permissions ЁЯФР * `millida.rating.command` тАФ access to the `/rating` command itself. By default, granted to all players. тЬЕ * `millida.rating.command.rewards` тАФ access to the `/rewards` and `/rating rewards` commands. By default, granted to all players. The command itself can be changed by modifying `config.yml` and `plugin.yml`. тЬЕ * `millida.rating.command.admin` тАФ access to the `/rating admin` command. By default, granted to all operators. ЁЯСС # Integrations ЁЯдЭ ## DecentHolograms If the `DecentHolograms` plugin is installed on the server, an additional configuration file `holograms.yml` appears in the server folder. By default, holograms are disabled, but they can be enabled and configured through this configuration file. ЁЯТб ## PlaceholderAPI If the `PlaceholderAPI` plugin is installed on the server, the following placeholders are automatically registered: ЁЯУЭ * `millidarating_top__<1-10>` Usage example: * `millidarating_top_day_1` тАФ top-1 for the day *(maximum 10)* ЁЯеЗ * `millidarating_top_week_2` тАФ top-2 for the week *(maximum 10)* ЁЯеИ * `millidarating_top_month_3` тАФ top-3 for the month *(maximum 10)* ЁЯеЙ * `millidarating_top__<1-10>_votes` Usage example: * `millidarating_top_day_4_votes` тАФ number of votes for top-4 of the day *(maximum 10)* тЬи * `millidarating_top_week_5_votes` тАФ number of votes for top-5 of the week *(maximum 10)* тЬи * `millidarating_top_month_6_votes` тАФ number of votes for top-6 of the month *(maximum 10)* тЬи # API ЁЯМР The API already exists, but for now, it can only be connected through a local Maven repository. To do this, clone the repository and use the command `gradle :api:publishToMavenLocal`, after which it can be imported: ```xml ru.leonidm.millida millida-rating-api 1.0.0 ``` ## Usage тЪЩя╕П The main entry point to the API is the `MillidaRatingApi` class, from which you can obtain an instance of the API and access all necessary services. There are also Bukkit events: * `RatingVoteEvent` тАФ triggered when `RatingRequester` finds a new vote ЁЯЧ│я╕П * `OfflinePlayerAwardedEvent` тАФ triggered when a player receives a reward with the property `online: false` ЁЯОБ * `PlayerAwardedEvent` тАФ triggered when a player receives a reward with the property `online: true` ЁЯОЙ **[!!!]** If you want to get information about votes, use the `RatingRequester` service, which stores hashed values, instead of `RatingRequestService`.
